product.title: Foundation 4 in 1 - Color Changing Foundation, Medium Spectrum with SPF 50, Hypoallergenic Hydrating Liquid Concealer, Long-lasting & Waterproof Natural Finish - 1.06 fl oz
featureBullets: 4-IN-1 VERSATILE FOUNDATION -This liquid foundation combines foundation, SPF 50 sunscreen, concealer and moisturizer! Self-adjusts to mach your skin tone, to help you create a perfect natural, demi-matte finish all day long.

COLOR-CHANGING CREAM - Our liquid foundation contains shade-sensing beads which are encapsulated pigments that can deliver shade transformation upon blending into skin, seamlessly matching your natural skin tone, and providing instant hydration in just 30 seconds.

IDEA FOR EVERYDAY USE - This multi-purpose foundation is the perfect blend of skin care and makeup. It contains nourishing ingredients and SPF50 sunscreen. The lightweight foundation provides light to medium coverage, reduces the look of acne scarring, wrinkles, redness, dark circles & pores.

SKIN-FRIENDLY FORMULA - Foundation infused with skin loving ingredients, free from parabens, phthalates, and artificial fragrances. For all skin types without any dryness or caking. Skin also looks glowy after removing it!

SWEAT-PROOF & LONG-LASTING - Whether it's daily, social or sports... any occasions, this color-changing liquid foundation protects your skin from UV light while providing a smooth and even look ALL DAY LONG!
product.description: Liquid color-changing foundation offers the ultimate convenience by seamlessly matching your natural skin tone. WHY YOU'LL LOVE IT: -Sun Protection Index SPF50 PA++ -Long-lasting oil control light texture, matte effect -Lightweight & waterproof -Covers wrinkles, acne scarring, redness, dark circles & pores -Providing instant hydration

specification.value: #3,956 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #47 in Foundation Makeup
Breathable, Lightweight, Long Lasting, Sweatproof, Travel Size
Paraben Free, Phthalate Free, Fragrance Free

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the foundation matches their skin tone well and provides good coverage for imperfections. The product includes SPF 50 for sun protection, feels light on the skin, and effectively moisturizes without making it oily or greasy. They appreciate its natural-looking finish, with one customer noting it doesn't look cakey in creases, and say it works well under makeup, particularly for those in their early 30s.

reviews.reviewTitle: For my not-so-girly girls — this is IT
reviews.reviewText: I love this stuff. It starts off like a white lotion, but as you blend it into your skin, it magically adjusts to your shade. It’s super easy to apply with just your fingers (no brushes needed 🙌), and it leaves a nice, natural glow without feeling heavy. The best part? It doubles as skin protection with SPF, so it’s basically skincare + makeup in one. Effortless, quick, and actually looks good. Honestly… it’s fabulous
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 22, 2026

reviews.reviewText: “I really like this sunscreen serum! It feels super lightweight on the skin and absorbs quickly without leaving any greasy or shiny finish. The color-mimicking technology is actually impressive — it blends nicely and helps even out my skin tone, so I don’t even need foundation on some days. It also feels very moisturizing and comfortable to wear throughout the day. I love that it’s fragrance-free and paraben-free, which is perfect for sensitive skin. Plus, SPF 50 gives great protection without feeling heavy. Overall, it’s a great everyday product if you want something that combines skincare, sun protection, and a light natural coverage
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 21, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Absolutely incredible! Perfection in a bottle.
reviews.reviewText: This foundation is a total game-changer. It combines foundation, serum, concealer, and moisturizer—all with a powerful SPF 50+, which is just insane. Color-Matching: The color-changing technology is pure magic. It adapts perfectly to my skin tone, providing a natural, even finish effortlessly. Lightweight Feel: Despite offering so much protection and coverage, it feels incredibly lightweight—almost as if I’m wearing nothing at all. It doesn't clog pores and lets my skin breathe. Long-Lasting & Protective: It is water- and sweat-resistant—ideal for daily wear or workouts—keeping my skin looking flawless and protected from the sun for hours on end. Skin Benefits: Beyond just coverage, it is formulated with nourishing, anti-aging ingredients that hydrate the skin and blur imperfections. It completely simplifies my makeup routine, and the result is radiant, healthy-looking skin. Highly recommended!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 14, 2026
reviews.customer: Pésimo este producto. Me llegaron las 5 lámparas y una de ellas dañada pues no me funciona la luz super opaca. No me siento complacido con este producto.

reviews.reviewText: I live in Florida, so I use SPF every day. This SPF 50 provides excellent sun protection while also helping to even out my skin tone. The texture is lightweight, absorbs quickly, and doesn’t leave a white cast or greasy feeling. It has no noticeable scent and the convenient size lasts a long time. My skin looks smoother and more polished even without foundation. A great option for everyday use.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 3, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Great lightweight foundation with SPF and natural finish
reviews.reviewText: I was honestly surprised by how well this foundation blended into my skin. The color-changing formula adjusts nicely and gives a smooth, natural finish without looking heavy or cakey. It feels lightweight but still helps even out my skin tone and cover minor imperfections. I also really like that it includes SPF 50 because it saves me an extra step in my routine. The texture is hydrating and comfortable to wear throughout the day, and it layers well with my other makeup products. It works especially well for everyday wear when I want something quick and natural-looking. A little goes a long way, and the finish looks fresh instead of oily. Overall, this is a great affordable option if you’re looking for a simple, lightweight foundation with skincare benefits built in. Would definitely use again!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 25, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Lightweight texture with a beautiful daily finish
reviews.reviewText: I’ve been using this SPF 30 sunscreen as part of my daily routine and I’m very pleased with the results. The texture is lightweight, absorbs quickly, and does not feel greasy, making it great to wear alone or under makeup. It leaves my skin feeling smooth, hydrated, and even, with a natural finish. The packaging looks elegant and is easy to use, and a small amount goes a long way. Ideal for everyday wear if you want sun protection without the heavy feel of traditional sunscreens. Perfect for a simple but effective skincare routine.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 29, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: Amazing coverage, but not much product in the bottle!!
reviews.reviewText: I love this foundation. The color match was perfect for me, it helped cover up my fine lines. It is lightweight and moisturizing. However I got this on 1/31/26, and I usually only wear makeup during the week when I am going to work and not much even when I do wear it. This morning 2/13/26, no more product would come out of the bottle. I don’t know if the pump stopped working and there is still a lot left in the bottle, but after two weeks it is potentially gone. I will update after I am able to “break” into the bottle to see what’s left.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 14, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: A Beautiful Serum Foundation That Truly Surprised Me
reviews.reviewText: I was impressed and completely in love with this serum from the very first use. The texture is incredibly lightweight and silky, making it feel more like skincare than makeup. As soon as I applied it, the color-adjusting formula blended beautifully into my skin tone, leaving a natural, smooth finish that looked fresh and radiant. What I really appreciate about this product is how multifunctional it is. It works as a foundation, sunscreen with SPF 50, moisturizer, and skin tone corrector all in one. The hydration is noticeable throughout the day, and my skin feels comfortable rather than heavy or cakey. It evens out the complexion very naturally, which is perfect if you like a soft, healthy look instead of thick coverage. Another great feature is its long-lasting and water-resistant formula. Even after several hours, my skin still looks balanced and glowing. For anyone looking for a lightweight foundation with skincare benefits and sun protection, this serum is a wonderful option. It truly feels like a smart combination of beauty and skincare in one elegant product.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 12, 2026
